issues.sample: The vehicle uses hydrogen fuel which is stored in three high pressure cylinders. Any fires or damage to the vehicle that affects the fuel system can result in an explosion. During a recent recall, customers were recommended not to park near structures because the car can explode

narrative.headline: What 2023 Hyundai Nexo owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 6 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (50% of reports).
